subject: GRB060427: Xinglong optical Observations
body:
M.Zhai, Y.L. Qiu, J.Y. Wei, J.Y. Hu, J.S. Deng and W.K. Zheng, report on
behalf of EAFON:

We have observed the field of GRB060427 (GCN 5006) with the Xinglong 0.8m
telescope 4.788 hours after the burst, thers is no new source brighter than
18.7(3-sigma) Mag within 4x600s combined R-band image.
                             
This message may be cited.
